description: Parametric model synchronized with 92mm Design Parameters.

cad_software.notes: Rotor requires mathematical sweeping via NACA airfoil libraries.

mountingHoleDiameter.rationale: Clearance for standard M4 or standard fan screws.

fanDiameter.rationale: Leaves a 1.0 mm tip clearance gap between blades and the 92mm outer frame.

bladeCount.rationale: Must be prime and NOT share a common denominator with the 8 spokes. Prevents extreme acoustic resonance.

airfoil.rationale: Validated, highly cambered profiles designed for low-speed turbomachinery.

twist_hub.rationale: Compensates for the difference in tangential velocity along the blade span.

twist_tip.rationale: Compensates for the difference in tangential velocity along the blade span.

chord_hub.rationale: Thicker at the root for mechanical strength.

chord_tip.rationale: Thinner at the tip for aerodynamic efficiency.

radialClearance.rationale: Leaves a 1.0 mm tip clearance gap.

hubDiameter.rationale: 35.0 mm provides root strength and minimizes dead-zones.

doe_study.study_name: 92mm Industrial Fan - Static Pressure Sensitivity Analysis

objectives.primary: Identify geometry with >0.5 inH2O peak static pressure.

critical_sensitivity_points.hypothesis: Reducing clearance from 1.0mm to 0.5mm will significantly increase pressure at high impedance.
9 blades will provide smoother pressure delivery than 7, but may increase drag/power consumption.
Increased hub pitch (>45deg) is necessary to maintain flow against the dense PSU grill rings.

test_matrix.description: Optimized for static pressure via tight tip clearance.
7-blade configuration for high airflow / low noise potential.
Maximum camber and pitch for high-impedance PSU environments.
